jobs.title: ROC Annual Return & Compliance
jobs.description:
My Private Limited Company is due for its ROC annual return, and I want the entire compliance package completed in one go. The assignment covers:  

• Drafting and e-filing the annual return with the Registrar of Companies, ensuring every statutory deadline is met.  
• Preparing the full set of financial statements in the prescribed format—balance sheet, profit & loss, notes, and board report—ready for both ROC and stakeholder review.  
• Conducting the statutory audit, coordinating with directors for representations, and generating the signed auditor’s report.  
• Completing the corporate tax

jobs.title: Instagram Copy Clarity Boost
jobs.description:
I’m preparing a new batch of Instagram posts to promote my offers, but the wording currently feels muddy. I need each caption to click instantly—clear idea, tone that matches my brand, and a call-to-action that nudges the scroll-stoppers to act without a second thought.

Here’s what I’ll hand over: the raw ideas, rough notes on audience pain points, a simple style guide, and a folder of images or Reels drafts. You’ll shape that into concise, engaging copy that fits Instagram’s character limits, sounds on-brand, and removes every trace of confusion or friction.

Acceptance criteria  
• Up to 15
skills: BrandingContent StrategyContent WritingCopywritingDigital MarketingInstagram MarketingSocial Media Management

jobs.title: Financial Reporting & Variance Analysis
jobs.description:
I need a qualified accountant who can transform my raw figures into management-ready financial reports focused on budget-versus-actual performance. You will receive my latest income statement and balance sheet; from there, I’d like you to dig into the numbers, calculate each variance, and explain the drivers behind any material differences.

skills: AccountingBudgeting and ForecastingBusiness AnalysisData AnalysisExcelFinanceFinancial AnalysisFinancial ConsultingFinancial ModelingGoogle Sheets

jobs.title: Divi Product Page Creation for Smart Plug
jobs.description:
Project title:
Build a simple Divi product page for BrightZero Smart Plug on existing WordPress site

Project description:
We are looking for a freelancer to build a clean, modern product page for our upcoming BrightZero Smart Plug on our existing WordPress + Divi website.

The page is already created in WordPress. We will provide:

wireframe / page structure
final copy
product photos
package renders
brand manual / logos
user manual PDF
links/placeholders for FAQ and future DoC

The goal is to build the page fast and clean so it fits our current site and brand style. This is not a webshop page
